name: ai-shopping-assistant
description: An e-commerce starter kit that turns your Content Lake into an AI-powered shopping assistant. Built with Next.js 16, the Studio, and Claude — the bot queries real-time structured content via Context MCP, so product answers are always accurate, up-to-date, and grounded in your actual data.

scripts.import-sample-data: source studio/.env 2>/dev/null; cd studio/seed && pnpm exec sanity dataset import data.tar.gz ${SANITY_STUDIO_DATASET:-} && cd ../../
scripts.dev:functions:logs: pnpm exec sanity functions logs agent-conversation
scripts.bootstrap: pnpm --filter studio exec sanity exec scripts/bootstrap.ts --with-user-token
